product_model.identity: SITE-AGNOSTIC autonomous data bridge. Coach picks prior service in TGP mobile → browser opens that site → after coach login, extension prompts Start client Import? → extension autonomously flips through many pages capturing JSON → posts to TGP scout ingest. Extension ships with the app by default.
product_model.not_this: Not a thin v0.1 TrueCoach-only stub. Not per-site hard-mapped tooling as the product core. Not server-side credential scraping.
product_model.launch_bar: v0.3 — full autonomous multi-page import loop. No half-launch.
flow: 1. User downloads TGP (extension included by default with the app)
4. Opens that site in browser; coach logs in with their own session
5. TGP extension popup: Start client Import?
6. Autonomous multi-page crawl — extension flips through pages and captures JSON as it loads
7. Envelopes to /api/scout/ingest; progress to mobile; complete settles import

decision_record_op59_reconcile_2026_07_1.decision: D2 DECIDED: imported clients are invite-pending, non-login tenant-owned canonical Person/roster records (hardened Option 1). No AuthPrincipal or credential is created during import; a Person is linked to an AuthPrincipal ONLY after an explicit credential-verified claim and verified ownership, through a unique AccountLink. Email is unverified imported data - never a canonical id and never an automatic linking key. Opaque server-issued person_id; tenant-scoped external_ref {source_platform, source_person_id} as idempotency/dedup key; states InvitePending -> Invited -> Claimed -> Suspended -> Deleted; single-use, single-tenant, short-lived (<=5 min), unguessable claim tokens; atomic claim (AuthPrincipal + AccountLink + status->Claimed in one transaction or roll back all three); rollback and erasure cascade imported data and links. Options 2 (create a full auth User at import) and 3 (separate staging identity as source of truth) are REJECTED. Billing/payment credentials/methods/cards/vault tokens/profiles/subscription instruments remain an explicit excluded family.
decision_record_op59_reconcile_2026_07_1.authorization: Explicit operator directive this session: research cybersecurity and RLS, select the top D2 option, and go with it. Closes the previously OPEN/PROTECTED D2 node.
decision_record_op59_reconcile_2026_07_1.real_goal: Immediate, deterministic, coach-visible import continuity with zero premature credentials and one canonical source of truth, while keeping tenant isolation, consent, deletion, and auditability intact.
decision_record_op59_reconcile_2026_07_1.root_cause: The placement choice fixes the authorization key (tenant vs subject uid), the dedup/idempotency key, the linking gate, and the deletion cascade - none of which can be designed until the record’s relationship to a credential is fixed. That is why D2 blocked IMPORTER-F.

options.option_1_selected: Invite-pending non-login roster shell (hardened) - one tenant-owned Person, no credential; deterministic credential-verified link on claim. SELECTED.
options.option_2_rejected: Create a full auth User at import - phantom credentialed accounts keyed on unverified imported email (account-takeover / auto-email-linking pattern), email-uniqueness collisions, unverified recovery paths, high blast radius. REJECTED.
options.option_3_rejected: Separate staging identity as source of truth - two live PII stores, drift, multiplied tenant-isolation and deletion-failure surface, no offsetting benefit at TGP scale. REJECTED.

decision_record_op59_reconcile_2026_07_1.five_step: Questioned the false “login at import” requirement (records exist without credentials - Entra/SCIM); Deleted premature credentials/temp passwords and any second identity store; Simplified to one Person entity + a status flag (SCIM active pattern); Accelerated with instant deterministic import (verification deferred to claim); Automated claim/link/verification last (automatic email-linking explicitly NOT automated).
decision_record_op59_reconcile_2026_07_1.idiot_index: Option 1 cost ~= intrinsic cost of one person row; Options 2/3 pay full auth-principal / second-store overhead for the same contact - high idiot index for no functional gain.
decision_record_op59_reconcile_2026_07_1.extreme_test: 10x (10k clients/one import): O(1) per row via opaque id + external_ref upsert; Option 2 would provision 10k credential-less logins. 100x (same human across coaches): correctly two tenant-scoped Person rows (NIST single-subscriber binding); Option 2 email-keyed logins collide (AliasExistsException) and can leak across tenants. Worst case (hostile competitor export): no credentials minted, so a poisoned import can at most create quarantined non-login roster rows in one tenant, contained by fail-closed RLS and reversible via rollback/erasure.
decision_record_op59_reconcile_2026_07_1.hyperscaler: Copy (evidence-backed): credential-less pending record (Entra), prestaged profile linked before first sign-in (Cognito AdminLinkProviderForUser), stable opaque id + externalId dedup + active status + write-only password (SCIM 7643/7644), record-then-bind + no-email-identifiers + single-use short-lived link tokens (NIST 800-63C-4), fail-closed RLS + no exposed service key (Supabase), deny-by-default + opaque ids + every-request object checks (OWASP). Do NOT copy: full IdP/federation stack, PPIs/FAL2 machinery, SCIM bulk protocol, temp-password issuance, enterprise directory ops.
decision_record_op59_reconcile_2026_07_1.rls_intent: Deny-by-default / fail-closed; RLS enabled on every exposed table with nothing granted until a policy allows it. Pre-claim roster rows are tenant/coach-scoped (no end-user auth.uid() yet - a subject-uid predicate would silently fail). Post-claim rows are subject-uid + tenant scoped. Importer runs a server-only controlled path; RLS-bypassing service/bypassrls credentials are never exposed to the browser or customers. Every request gets an object-level tenant check; ids are opaque and non-guessable.
decision_record_op59_reconcile_2026_07_1.good_without_bad: Keep deterministic import, roster continuity, no premature credential, single source of truth, credentialed explicit claim + deterministic link, tenant isolation + fail-closed authz, idempotent replay, rollback, audit, deletion.
